## Problem

Describe the user, workflow or security problem.

## Change

Describe the API, UI, policy, schema or infrastructure change.

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests and 90% coverage gate
- [ ] Frontend type check, unit tests and build
- [ ] OpenAPI schema generation checked when required
- [ ] Alembic migration added when required
- [ ] Synthetic benchmark updated when decision behaviour changes
- [ ] No real or confidential data included
- [ ] Logs and evidence do not repeat matched identifiers
- [ ] Production limits documented
